title: Leave a Review | Pet Emergency Center Fort Lauderdale
description: Share your experience with Pet Emergency Center. Your review helps other South Florida families find us when their pets need help. Thank You for Trusting Us.
ogTitle: Leave a Review | Pet Emergency Center
ogDescription: Tell us how we did. Your review helps other South Florida families find emergency care for their pets.
main:
Thank You for Trusting Us

Thank You for Trusting Us With Your Pet.

Your review helps other families across South Florida find us when their pet needs help. If you are willing to share your experience, we are grateful.

Independently owned for over 40 years Real reviews from real families Your honest feedback helps us improve Takes about two minutes
Grateful
Two paths

How Was Your Experience?

We want to hear from you, however your visit went. Choose the path that fits your experience.

My Experience Was Great.

Thank you so much. If you would share that experience publicly, your review on Google helps other families discover us when they need emergency care for their pets. It takes about two minutes.

Leave a Google Review

My Experience Was Less Than Great.

We are sorry. We genuinely want to know what happened so we can make it right and learn from it. Your direct feedback goes straight to Paige Obrig, our practice manager and co-owner. We will read every word.

Send Us Direct Feedback
Why reviews matter to us

Why Your Review Actually Matters.

We are an independently owned emergency veterinary practice in a market increasingly dominated by corporate chains with massive marketing budgets. We do not have the budgets they do. What we have is a team of people who care, and families who trust us enough to tell other families about us.

When you leave a review, you are not just thanking us. You are helping a panicked pet owner at 11 PM somewhere in South Florida find an emergency practice they can trust. That is real work, and we appreciate it.

Your review is how the next family finds us.
Direct feedback

Send Paige a Note Directly.

This form goes straight to our practice manager and co-owner. It is private, not posted publicly, and read by a person, not a system.

Your feedback goes directly to Paige Obrig. We read every word.
Other places to share

Other Places You Can Leave a Review.

If you would prefer to share your experience somewhere other than Google, here are a few options:

Facebook Yelp Nextdoor

Whatever Path You Choose, Thank You.

Trust is everything in emergency medicine, and we do not take yours for granted. From all of us at Pet Emergency Center, thank you for letting us care for your pet.
